headline: Is Walmart's Health Business Signaling Pharmacy Strength?
summary: WMT's U.S. health and wellness sales rise in high single digits as pharmacy scripts climb, despite Maximum Fair Pricing headwinds pressuring reported growth.

headline: Why Costco's Financial Strength Could Outpace Retail Challenges
summary: COST holds $18.24B in liquid assets, keeps debt low and plans 28 new warehouses as membership fees climb 13.6%.

raw.headline: Why Costco's Financial Strength Could Outpace Retail Challenges

headline: What GameStop’s $55B Bid For eBay Means For Investors
summary: In a move that would have sounded ridiculous just a few years ago, GameStop (NYSE: GME) has officially proposed acquiring eBay for $125 per share. That values the deal at roughly $55 billion, and turns one of the most unlikely comeback stories in corporate history into a full-blown takeover attempt. If you rewind to 2021, GameStop was the poster child of retail decline. Today, it’s trying to buy one of the internet’s original marketplaces. Also see, Should eBay Go For GameStop's Offer.

headline: Mama's Creations Redefines the Modern Deli Experience with Major National Retail Expansion
summary: Mama's Creations Inc., a leading provider of high-quality, fresh deli-prepared foods, today announced a major retail expansion for its consumer brands. This month, an expansive lineup of authentic, premium prepared meals under the Mama's Creations and Mama Mancini's labels is officially rolling out to the Fresh Deli sections of 2,000 Walmart locations and 750 Target locations nationwide, marking a landmark achievement for the company's national growth strategy.

headline: Target Offers 10% Teacher Discount Nationwide During Teacher Appreciation Week, Alongside Year-Round Benefits
summary: MINNEAPOLIS-- Target Corporation is recognizing teachers across the United States with a 10% storewide discount during Teacher Appreciation Week, in addition to year-round benefits and local efforts...
